title: ceratolobus subangulatus
intro: Ceratolobus subangulatus, also known as the Ceratolobus tree, is a species of plant in the family Arcaceae. This tree has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Ceratolobus subangulatus include its potential use in treating infections and wounds, as well as its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant's bark and seeds can be used to create remedies for various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
